name: Funfair Billionaire
short_description: Funfair Billionaire is the ultimate experience of a carnival as shady as a scratched-off lottery ticket. Rigged machines, sadistic physics, and a fate sealed by an algorithm that despises you—because deep down, you enjoy suffering. One more round? Of course.
detailed_description:
Do you dream of becoming a billionaire by draining rigged carnival machines? Welcome to FUNFAIR BILLIONAIRE, the game where you throw your fake money into shady attractions just for the thrill of watching numbers go up (or not).

A game that reeks of sweat, blurry pixels, and questionable game design. Built with the blood, sweat, and tears of a developer who probably should have stayed an accountant but instead decided to create his "masterpiece"—badly optimized and with a certain disdain for usability.

✨ A GAMEPLAY EXPERIENCE AS ADDICTIVE AS IT IS UNFAIR ✨

💸 Throw your fake cash into machines as rigged as your last failed relationship:

  • 🎰 Slot Machine – Win big! (Well… if the algorithm decides to let you.)

  • 🕹 Coin Pusher – Watch coins fall and experience a shameful level of excitement.

  • 🦾 Claw Machine – A physics system straight out of a nightmare. Good luck grabbing that cursed gold bar.

  • 🔴 Roulette – Bet everything on red, instantly regret it.

  •  ♣  Blackjack– Bank always wins.

  • 🔑 KeyMaster – Look at it bounce like a half-cooked spaghetti

  • 🦓 Zebra Race – Don't... Don't play this. It is the best way to win.

  •  🇯🇵 Pachinko – We're still trying to figure out how it works.

⭐ THE FORTUNE TELLER MACHINE: A MYSTERIOUS VOID ⭐

Too much money? Seek wisdom from The Fortune Teller Machine, a mystical entity that promises to reveal your destiny… but, let’s be honest, mostly mocks you. Mystical? Yes. Useful? Absolutely not. But who knows? Maybe it’s right (spoiler: it’s not).

🎵 A SOUND EXPERIENCE STRAIGHT FROM HELL 🎧

Every sound in this game was personally crafted by the developer. And guess what? He has zero musical talent. Expect off-key jingles, suspiciously sourced sound effects, and a soundtrack that will make you question your love for music.

🔥 FEATURES WE PROBABLY SHOULD HAVE TESTED 🔥

  • 🌬 Graphics – An unintentional tribute to the PS2 era, but blurrier.

  • 🔋 Optimization – Runs at 22 FPS on a gaming PC yet somehow hits 60 FPS on a toaster.

  • 😡 Guaranteed Rage – Every session is a life lesson in existential frustration.

FUNFAIR BILLIONAIRE is the game that will make you say:
"Why am I still playing this?"
and then "Alright, just one more round..."

Available on Steam. Buy it, or just throw your money out the window—the result will be the same. 🎡🎰💸
